plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Roadmap + backlog graph with prioritized, feasibility-checked multi-session fanout. Skills (/slice, /backlog, /sync, /init, /fanout), four agents, a SessionStart hook (ready-wave + backlog count + reconcile nudge), a PR-watch monitor, and an MCP server 'graph' (read + comment-preserving mutate, roadmap + backlog tools).
